title: TrailGenic Gear Intelligence Dataset
description: Hiking gear scored through the TrailGenic longevity lens. Fasted high-altitude performance metrics. Public review signal rescored for metabolic load, altitude readiness, recovery impact, and longevity protocol fit.
methodology: Public review synthesis (OutdoorGearLab, REI, Reddit r/ultralight). TG scores reflect longevity-protocol weighting, not consumer average.
